name: Through the Clouds — validate alerts vs Hansen GFC
description: Reads the cross-reference metrics emitted by ttc_detect_change and applies the BUILD_CONTRACT §4.4 demo gate. Hansen is optical/cloud-limited, so SAR-yes/Hansen-no is NOT auto-wrong (ADR-0005); the SPOT-7 visual check is flagged for human review (handoff §13.4).

steps.description: Apply UA>=0.75 & PA>=0.65 & F1>=0.70 & alert_area_pct in [0.2,8] gate; flag SPOT visual for human review.
steps.code:
import json, os
mp = '/data/outputs/$run_id/validation_metrics.json'
m = json.load(open(mp)) if os.path.exists(mp) else {}
gate = (m.get('users_accuracy', 0) >= 0.75 and m.get('producers_accuracy', 0) >= 0.65 and m.get('f1', 0) >= 0.70 and 0.2 <= m.get('alert_area_pct_of_aoi', 0) <= 8)
m['pipeline_passed'] = bool(gate)
m['needs_human_review'] = True
m['note_gate'] = 'Ships caveated regardless (ADR-0007); object-precision vs Hansen ' + str(m.get('object_precision_vs_hansen'))
result['validation'] = m
result['pipeline_passed'] = bool(gate)
result['success'] = True
